issues.detail: 6 of 16 modules (M01, M02, M03, M04, M05, M10) have ZERO functional description. These form 37.5% of the system scope. Sections 4.8-4.13 are placeholder [CAN BO SUNG] entries only.
issues.suggested-fix: User must provide original functional specification document or interview subject matter expert to capture features, rules, and entities for these 6 modules before proceeding to design/dev.

issues.detail: 3 critical integration points have unknown protocols: (1) VNACCS/VCIS declaration data flow (REST/MQ/file?), (2) Emanifest/Emaiest container lookup (?), (3) Barcode scanner hardware (?). Confidence: Low.
issues.suggested-fix: SA must clarify with customs authority: What are the actual API/protocol specs for each integration? Block architecture phase until these are confirmed.

issues.detail: User authentication and authorization mechanism not described. Is it LDAP/SSO/local? How is Ma HQ-based role isolation enforced? Security architecture cannot be finalized without this.
issues.suggested-fix: Contact PO/security team: Confirm auth model (GAP-004). Does system integrate with existing government SSO or use local auth?

issues.detail: 11 CTDT entity types (GiayPhep, HoaDon, ChungTuXuatXu, VanDon, etc.) in Section 6 share identical CRUD+approval workflow (M11-F008, M11-F009, M12-F008-F013) but are defined as separate entities instead of a polymorphic type. This creates 66+ redundant screens and 11x implementation cost.
issues.suggested-fix: SA: consolidate 11 CTDT types into single polymorphic CTDT entity with type=enum field. Create 1 generic CRUD spec + 1 approval workflow spec. Type-specific field appendices only.

issues.detail: M11-F008 'Duyet sua CTDT (11 document types)' and M11-F009 'Duyet huy CTDT (11 document types)' are composite features lumping 11 separate business operations into one feature card. Similarly M12-F008 through M12-F013 each represent 11 variants. Total: 66 feature-equivalents falsely counted as 13 features.
issues.suggested-fix: Recount features: 82 declared - (11+11+11+11+11+11+11) actual = 8 composite placeholders. Actual distinct feature count is ~50. Update metrics. Consider splitting composite features into separate feature cards or use configurable metadata approach.

issues.detail: Actor 'He thong VNACCS/VCIS' source is 'implied: So TN field pattern, Emanifest reference' — pattern matching without explicit confirmation. Not a quote from document.
issues.suggested-fix: Verify: Is VNACCS/VCIS explicitly mentioned in source document? If yes, add quote. If no, mark as 'assumed system actor'.

issues.detail: Entity fields: 25 fields lack DB type constraints. Examples: BienBanBanGiao.dia_diem_vc_di = VARCHAR(200) assumed but no length spec in document. ToKhai.so_to_khai = VARCHAR(12) — where does 12 char limit come from? Need explicit validation.
issues.suggested-fix: Verify field constraints via OCR: grep doc-brief for '0/12' character counter reference (found in BR-INTEL-038). For other fields, check raw OCR or contact domain expert.

issues.detail: No test-data-hints.md file found. Without happy/edge/negative test data samples for each entity, QA will struggle with test case generation.
issues.suggested-fix: Create docs/intel/test-data-hints.md with: (1) happy path sample per entity, (2) edge case examples (boundary values, special chars in Vietnamese names), (3) negative cases (invalid barcode, missing Ma HQ).

issues.detail: BR-INTEL-036 'All search screens require Ma HQ' and BR-INTEL-037 'Barcode scanning available' both claim to apply to 'ALL' features but only 38 rules listed for 82 features. Cross-cutting rules are under-captured.
issues.suggested-fix: Extract NFR signals from Section 9 as cross-cutting rules: Pagination (20/trang), UTF-8 encoding, timezone (UTC+7), tab-based detail views. Add to rule section with 'scope: cross-cutting'.

issues.detail: Module 'Out of scope' fields present but feature-level 'In scope / Out of scope' are sometimes implicit (e.g., M06-F002 'Out of scope: none' without explaining edge cases like goods arriving partway).
issues.suggested-fix: For each feature, add explicit 'out-of-scope' bullet (allow 'none' but be explicit about it). E.g., M06-F002: 'Out of scope: goods arriving in multiple shipments (not covered by this feature)'.

issues.detail: Feature action count varies wildly: M09-F001 (1 action: barcode scan → auto-confirm) vs M12-F002 (10+ actions: search, filter, view detail, expand tabs, view charts). No maximum action threshold enforced.
issues.suggested-fix: Define granularity ceiling: if feature has >8 distinct user actions, split it. M12-F002 should be 'Search+list' + 'View detail' + 'View charts' as 3 separate features.

issues.detail: Section 13.6 DoD checklist has only 8 items (all ACs, isolation, workflow, pagination, barcode, print, Vietnamese, audit). Missing: performance SLA, concurrency, error handling, accessibility, offline capability.
issues.suggested-fix: Expand DoD with: [ ] API response time <2s for search, [ ] Handle 1000 concurrent users, [ ] Graceful barcode timeout, [ ] WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility, [ ] Error messages in Vietnamese.

issues.detail: P0 count: 9/82 = 11%, P1 count: ~50 = 61%, P2 count: 21 = 26%. Distribution is reasonable.
issues.suggested-fix: No fix needed — priority distribution follows common pattern (10-15% critical, 50-60% high, 25-35% medium).

issues.detail: Section 13.7-13.8 not present. Template expects: 13.7 (Risk/Dependency Matrix), 13.8 (Rollout Strategy). These are implicit in 13.1-13.6 but not explicitly called.
issues.suggested-fix: Optional: Add 13.7 and 13.8 if needed by SDLC agents. Currently 13.1-13.6 sufficient for BA/SA/Tech-lead/Dev/QA/Reviewer.

issues.detail: Metrics claim 'screens: 500' but raw-extract.md says '500 images found, 8 OCR sampled'. Not verified that all 500 are distinct screens vs duplicates/thumbnails.
issues.suggested-fix: Sampling bias note: only ~8 of 500 images were OCRd. Actual distinct screen count unknown. Recommend re-count after visual dedup.

layer-1-traceability.notes: Strong source attribution. 91 explicit quotes found. Implied sources generally well-reasoned but should verify actor VNACCS/VCIS.

critical-issues: ISSUE-004: CTDT polymorphism not recognized - 11 entities should be 1
ISSUE-006: Actor VNACCS/VCIS source weak (implied from field pattern)
ISSUE-005: Composite features inflate count; actual ~50 not 82
ISSUE-009: Cross-cutting rules (pagination, encoding) not captured as rules

examples: M11-F008, M11-F009: each contains 11 approval workflows
M12-F008 through M12-F013: 6 CRUD features times 11 CTDT types

must-resolve-before-design: ISSUE-001: Obtain M01-M05, M10 functional specs
ISSUE-005: Recount and redefine feature granularity

recommendations.reason: 5 HIGH-severity issues prevent design phase from proceeding. Missing 37.5% of module specs, undefined integrations, and composite feature lumping require resolution.
immediate-actions: Contact PO for M01-M05 and M10 functional descriptions
Schedule SA review of integration protocols
Escalate auth model decision to security team
Architecture decision: CTDT polymorphic entity design (~2 hours, saves 30% effort)
Recount features: collapse 82 to ~50 actual distinct features

confidence.reasoning: Document well-structured and heavily sourced (91 explicit quotes) but contains major architectural gaps: 37.5% of modules undocumented, 3 undefined integrations, significant feature lumping. Strong reverse-engineering from UI screenshots (reliable for feature list, risky for business logic).
